channel.title: Programming on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation
channel.description: Recent content in Programming on >_ John Januszczak | Technology & Innovation

item.title: The Next Compiler: AI and the Evolution of Abstraction
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: AI coding tools represent the next major shift in software engineering abstraction, comparable to the transition from assembly language to compilers.

item.title: The Prompt Diet: How We Chopped 57% of Our Agent's Mind and Made It Smarter
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A Lab entry on reducing agent prompt overhead by moving 57 percent of instruction logic into deterministic scripts, cutting token waste while improving reliability.

item.title: The Terminal is Your Chalk Circle: Why I Code from the Observation Deck
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: Why leading in the era of Generative AI requires a shift from ‘getting your hands dirty’ in code to observing systems like a Toyota foreman in a chalk circle.

item.title: The Evolution of Python Environment Management
item.author: info@januszczak.org (John Januszczak)
item.description: A practitioner’s walkthrough of why Python suffers from dependency hell, how tools like virtualenv, pyenv, Poetry, and UV emerged to solve it, and what this evolution tells us about modern software ecosystems.
